## Terms Create Term

`<blackboard:terms-create-term>`

Creates an academic term.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional client-supplied identifier for correlating requests.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body for create or update operations.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Terms Get Term

`<blackboard:terms-get-term>`

Returns details for a single term.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>termId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Academic term ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional client-supplied identifier for correlating requests.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

- BLACKBOARD:BAD_REQUEST
- BLACKBOARD:CLIENT_ERROR

- BLACKBOARD:SERVER_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:TIMEOUT
- BLACKBOARD:UNAUTHORIZED

## Terms Get Terms

`<blackboard:terms-get-terms>`

Returns terms, optionally filtered by query parameters.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Zero-based index of the first item to return.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum number of items to return.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>includePermissions</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to include permission metadata in the response.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>externalId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>External identifier for the resource.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>dataSourceId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Data source ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>availability.available</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by availability status.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional client-supplied identifier for correlating requests.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- BLACKBOARD:BAD_REQUEST
- BLACKBOARD:CLIENT_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:CONFLICT
- BLACKBOARD:CONNECTIVITY
- BLACKBOARD:FORBIDDEN
- BLACKBOARD:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:NOT_FOUND
- BLACKBOARD:SECURITY
- BLACKBOARD:SERVER_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:TIMEOUT
- BLACKBOARD:UNAUTHORIZED

## Terms Update Term

`<blackboard:terms-update-term>`

Updates an existing term.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>termId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Academic term ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional client-supplied identifier for correlating requests.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body for create or update operations.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- BLACKBOARD:BAD_REQUEST
- BLACKBOARD:CLIENT_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:CONFLICT
- BLACKBOARD:CONNECTIVITY
- BLACKBOARD:FORBIDDEN
- BLACKBOARD:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:NOT_FOUND
- BLACKBOARD:SECURITY
- BLACKBOARD:SERVER_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:TIMEOUT
- BLACKBOARD:UNAUTHORIZED

## Token Access Token

`<blackboard:token-access-token>`

Requests an access token from the Blackboard Learn authorization server using the configured
credentials.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional client-supplied identifier for correlating requests.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body for create or update operations.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- BLACKBOARD:BAD_REQUEST
- BLACKBOARD:CLIENT_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:CONFLICT
- BLACKBOARD:CONNECTIVITY
- BLACKBOARD:FORBIDDEN
- BLACKBOARD:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:NOT_FOUND
- BLACKBOARD:SECURITY
- BLACKBOARD:SERVER_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:TIMEOUT
- BLACKBOARD:UNAUTHORIZED

## Users Create User

`<blackboard:users-create-user>`

Creates a user in Blackboard Learn.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional client-supplied identifier for correlating requests.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body for create or update operations.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

- BLACKBOARD:BAD_REQUEST
- BLACKBOARD:CLIENT_ERROR

- BLACKBOARD:NOT_FOUND

## Users Get Users

`<blackboard:users-get-users>`

Searches or lists users using query parameters supported by the API.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Zero-based index of the first item to return.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum number of items to return.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>includePermissions</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to include permission metadata in the response.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>userName</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Username filter or value.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>externalId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>External identifier for the resource.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>created</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by resource creation timestamp.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>createdCompare</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comparison operator for the created timestamp filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>modified</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by last modified timestamp.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>modifiedCompare</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comparison operator for the modified filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>lastLogin</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by last login timestamp.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>lastLoginCompare</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comparison operator for the lastLogin filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>dataSourceId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Data source ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>institutionRoleIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Institution role IDs to filter by.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>name.family</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by family name.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>studentId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Student user ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>contact.email</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by contact email address.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>availability.available</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by availability status.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sort</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Sort order for the result set.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional client-supplied identifier for correlating requests.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- BLACKBOARD:BAD_REQUEST
- BLACKBOARD:CLIENT_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:CONFLICT
- BLACKBOARD:CONNECTIVITY

## Users Update User

`<blackboard:users-update-user>`

Updates an existing user.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>userId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional client-supplied identifier for correlating requests.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Request body for create or update operations.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- BLACKBOARD:BAD_REQUEST
- BLACKBOARD:CLIENT_ERROR

- BLACKBOARD:NOT_FOUND

- BLACKBOARD:SERVER_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:TIMEOUT
- BLACKBOARD:UNAUTHORIZED

## Users Upcoming Events

`<blackboard:usersupcoming-events>`

Returns upcoming events for the authenticated user (for example, calendar or course activity within
the requested range).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>courseId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Course ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Event or entity type filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>since</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Lower bound (inclusive) for the time range filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>until</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Upper bound (inclusive) for the time range filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Zero-based index of the first item to return.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>includePermissions</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to include permission metadata in the response.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum number of items to return.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sort</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Sort order for the result set.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>correlationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Optional client-supplied identifier for correlating requests.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- BLACKBOARD:BAD_REQUEST
- BLACKBOARD:CLIENT_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:CONFLICT
- BLACKBOARD:CONNECTIVITY
- BLACKBOARD:FORBIDDEN
- BLACKBOARD:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:NOT_FOUND
- BLACKBOARD:SECURITY
- BLACKBOARD:SERVER_ERROR
- BLACKBOARD:TIMEOUT
- BLACKBOARD:UNAUTHORIZED

## Types

### TLS

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Enabled Protocols</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A comma-separated list of protocols enabled for this context.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Enabled Cipher Suites</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A comma-separated list of cipher suites enabled for this context.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Trust Store</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#TrustStore">Trust Store</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Trust store configuration for TLS.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Store</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#KeyStore">Key Store</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Key store configuration for TLS.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Revocation Check</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#StandardRevocationCheck">Standard Revocation Check</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#CustomOcspResponder">Custom OCSP Responder</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#CrlFile">CRL File</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Certificate revocation checking configuration.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Trust Store

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The location (which will be resolved relative to the current classpath and file system, if possible) of the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The type of store used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The algorithm used by the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Insecure</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If true, no certificate validations will be performed, rendering connections vulnerable to attacks. Use at your own risk.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Key Store

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The location (which will be resolved relative to the current classpath and file system, if possible) of the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The type of store used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the key store contains many private keys, this attribute indicates the alias of the key that should be used. If not defined, the first key in the file will be used by default.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the private key.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The algorithm used by the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Standard Revocation Check

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Only End Entities</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Only verifies the last element of the certificate chain.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Prefer Crls</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Try CRL instead of OCSP first.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>No Fallback</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Do not use the secondary checking method (the one not selected before).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Soft Fail</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Avoid verification failure when the revocation server can not be reached or is busy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Custom OCSP Responder

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Url</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The URL of the OCSP responder.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Cert Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Alias of the signing certificate for the OCSP response (must be in the trust store), if present.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### CRL File

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The path to the CRL file.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnection

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Fails Deployment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The reconnection strategy to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnect

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Frequency</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How often in milliseconds to reconnect.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Blocking</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If false, the reconnection strategy runs in a separate, non-blocking thread.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Count</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How many reconnection attempts to make.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnect Forever

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Frequency</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How often in milliseconds to reconnect.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Blocking</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If false, the reconnection strategy runs in a separate, non-blocking thread.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Expiration Policy

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Max Idle Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A scalar time value for the maximum amount of time a dynamic configuration instance should be allowed to be idle before itâs considered eligible for expiration.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Max Idle Time</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Error Mapping

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Source</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ANY</p></li><li><p>REDELIVERY_EXHAUSTED</p></li><li><p>TRANSFORMATION</p></li><li><p>EXPRESSION</p></li><li><p>SECURITY</p></li><li><p>CLIENT_SECURITY</p></li><li><p>SERVER_SECURITY</p></li><li><p>ROUTING</p></li><li><p>CONNECTIVITY</p></li><li><p>RETRY_EXHAUSTED</p></li><li><p>TIMEOUT</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Mule error type that triggers this mapping.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the error type to map to.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>
---

# Blackboard Connector 0.1.0

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Connector for Blackboard (Blackboard Connector) enables Mule applications to access the
Blackboard API.

> [!NOTE] Blackboard Connector is a beta connector that is subject to the Beta Services Terms at
> [Agreements - Salesforce.com](https://www.salesforce.com/company/legal/) or a written Unified
> Pilot Agreement if executed by Customer, and the Non-GA Gen AI and Non-GA Credit Consumption terms
> in the
> [Product Terms Directory](https://ptd.salesforce.com/?_ga=2.247987783.1372150065.1709219475-629000709.1639001992).
> Use of this beta connector with external systems or services consumes
> [Mule messages](../../general/usage-metrics) and is at the Customerâs sole discretion.

For information about compatibility and fixed issues, refer to the Blackboard Connector Release
Notes.

## Before You Begin

To use this connector, you must be familiar with:

- The Blackboard Connectorâs API
- Anypoint Connectors
- Mule runtime engine (Mule)
- Elements and global elements in a Mule flow
- How to create a Mule app using Anypoint Code Builder or Anypoint Studio

Before creating an app, you must have:

- Credentials to access the Blackboard target resource
- Anypoint Platform
- The latest versions of Anypoint Code Builder or Anypoint Studio

## Next Step

After you complete the prerequisites, youâre ready to create an app and configure the connector
using [Anypoint Studio](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-studio) or
[Anypoint Code Builder](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-acb).

## See Also

- [Introduction to Anypoint Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/introduction-to-anypoint-connectors)
- [Use Exchange to Discover Connectors, Templates, and Examples](../../connectors/introduction/intro-use-exchange)
- [Blackboard Connector Reference](blackboard-connector-reference)
- [Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
